title: Crystal Verse
description: Crystal Verse - Rebuilt from the ground up for Crystal PvP
body:
![Crystal Verse](https://i.imgur.com/fwmvJsP.png)

Crystal Verse is a Crystal PvP focused modpack built around smooth gameplay, clean visuals, and high performance.

Rebuilt for **Minecraft 26.1.2** with refreshed visuals, redesigned UI, improved optimizations, and a cleaner overall experience.

⚡ Smooth & responsive gameplay  
🛡️ PvP-focused HUD improvements  
🎨 Modern clean interface  
🚀 High FPS & stable frametimes  
📦 Preloaded PvP resource packs  
📸 Integrated screenshot tools

---

## 🚀 Performance

Crystal Verse is heavily optimized to keep gameplay smooth, responsive, and consistent, especially during Crystal PvP.

Benchmarks were tested using consistent settings and real gameplay scenarios including movement, Crystal PvP fights, and crowded areas.

**Test system**
- GTX 1650
- i7-7700K

| Scenario | Vanilla/Fabric | Lunar Client | Crystal Verse |
|---|---|---|---|
| Idle | 1200-1800 FPS | 200-500 FPS | 1000-1500+ FPS |
| Movement | 700-1100 FPS | 200-450 FPS | 800-1200+ FPS |
| Crystal PvP | 250-400 FPS | 300-375 FPS | ~700+ FPS |
| Crowded Areas | 250-450 FPS | 150-200 FPS | 400-700 FPS |

> Crystal Verse stays surprisingly lightweight while still including a full PvP-focused experience with HUDs, visual improvements, utility features, and preloaded packs.

Performance testing and frametime monitoring were done using [spark](https://spark.lucko.me/).

Performance depends on hardware, settings, render distance, shaders, and server load.

---

## ⚡ Optimization

Crystal Verse focuses on real gameplay performance rather than unrealistic benchmark numbers.

The modpack is tuned for:
- smoother frametimes
- reduced stuttering
- faster chunk rendering
- lower rendering overhead
- cleaner combat performance

Even during crowded fights and heavy rendering situations, gameplay stays responsive and stable.

---

## ⚔️ PvP Features

Built specifically for competitive gameplay and cleaner combat visibility.

- 🛡️ Totem Counter
- ❤️ Status Effect Bars
- 🧱 Shield Statuses
- 🔥 Low Fire
- 🎯 Cleaner Combat Visibility
- ⚡ Faster HUD Feedback

---

## 🎨 Redesigned Interface

Crystal Verse features a refreshed visual style with a cleaner and more modern interface.

- New logo & icon
- Cleaner menus
- Better readability
- Consistent purple aesthetic
- Improved overall UI

---

## 📦 Preloaded Resource Packs

Crystal Verse includes multiple preloaded PvP resource packs ready to use.

- Cleaner crystal textures
- Better visibility
- Competitive-focused styles

---

## 💜 Community

Join over **13,000+ Crystal Verse players** and be part of the community.

💬 Discord  
[https://discord.gg/crystalverse](https://discord.gg/QKVr9NrYyn)

If you enjoy Crystal Verse, share it with your friends and help the community keep growing :)

---

## ❓ FAQ

<details>
<summary>Open FAQ</summary>

### Q: What Minecraft version does Crystal Verse support?
A: Crystal Verse is built for Minecraft 26.1.2 using Fabric.

---

### Q: Is Crystal Verse client-side only?
A: Yes. It works on vanilla-compatible servers.

---

### Q: Can I use my own resource packs?
A: Yes. You can still use your own custom packs.

---

### Q: Is this only for high-end PCs?
A: No. Crystal Verse is designed to improve performance across both low-end and high-end systems.

</details>
